name: Turkey Salad Stuffed Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place eggs in a medium-sized saucepan with enough water to cover. Bring to boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes. Drain the eggs and cool under cold running water. Peel the eggs and halve them crosswise. Remove the yolks and set aside.
2. Cut celery, green onions, red pepper, and turkey into 1-inch cubes. Place the vegetables and turkey in a food processor. Pulse on-off until finely chopped, being careful not to overprocess. Transfer the mixture to a medium-sized bowl.
3. Add mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, cider vinegar, sugar, and salt to the bowl with the vegetable mixture. Stir until well combined.
4. Spoon 1 rounded tablespoon of the mixture into each hollow of the egg halves. Serve immediately or refrigerate for up to 12 hours.
